Description: Scope confirmation and preliminary program review (Step 1.1)
Notes: Review App B-Plumb conceptual drawing, RFP §3.4, and all SOW items (SOW-0016, SOW-0027b, SOW-0043, SOW-0045, SOW-0046, SOW-0048, SOW-0050); confirm scope with Architect

Description: Governing code edition confirmation (Step 1.2)
Notes: Contact Alberta Safety Codes authority to confirm applicable National Plumbing Code edition; record confirmed edition

Description: Site investigation — Old North Shop existing drainage (Step 1.3)
Notes: Site visit to document existing drain/vent conditions in Old North Shop washroom area (SOW-0072); record pipe sizes, materials, invert elevations

Description: Floor drain layout establishment (Step 2.1)
Notes: Finalize floor drain locations for main shop repair bays (~3 drains), wash bay (1 drain to mud sump), emergency shower drain, wash station drain, washroom drains, sump drains (SOW-0045); coordinate with Structural for slab sleeves

Description: Drainage routing design (Step 2.2)
Notes: Establish main building drain path to new 2000 US gal septic holding tank; wash bay drain path to exterior mud sump; service pit/trench drainage provision; confirm gravity flow with Civil grade elevations

Description: Pipe sizing and slope calculations (Step 2.3)
Notes: Size all drain and vent pipes per NPC/Alberta plumbing code based on fixture unit loads (from DEL-006-06); calculate slopes; determine cleanout locations/spacings; produce slope diagram with inverts

Description: Vent system design (Step 2.4)
Notes: Determine vent stack locations based on drain layout and code; route vent piping from traps to vent stacks; coordinate roof penetrations with Architectural/Structural at 35' ceiling; confirm vent stack heights per code

Description: Preliminary drain & vent drawings production (Step 2.5)
Notes: Produce preliminary plan view drawings showing floor drain locations, drain pipe routing with sizes and slopes, vent stack locations, septic connection point, mud sump connection point

Description: Preliminary design County submission (Step 2.6)
Notes: Submit preliminary plumbing design package to Camrose County for review and approval; address County comments

Description: IFC drawing production — complete drain & vent plan set (Step 3.2)
Notes: Produce complete IFC drawing set: plan view drain layout, plan view vent layout, isometric diagrams, detail sheets (floor drain assembly, cleanout, mud sump connection, service pit drain, trap details), slope diagram, material/equipment schedule, construction notes

Description: Cross-discipline coordination review (Step 3.3)
Notes: Coordinate with Architectural, Structural, Mechanical, Civil: verify sleeve locations, floor drain positions vs. floor plan, mud sump connection grade, no mechanical/ductwork conflicts

Description: Internal quality review against code and specification requirements (Step 3.4)
Notes: Review drawings against applicable plumbing code, all Specification requirements (REQ-006-03-001 to REQ-006-03-033), cross-document consistency with DEL-006-02/04/05

Description: P.Eng. stamp and sign IFC drawings (Step 3.5)
Notes: Plumbing Engineer stamps and signs all IFC Drain & Vent Plan drawing sheets; confirm current Alberta P.Eng. licence

Description: IFC drawing set issuance and distribution (Step 3.6)
Notes: Issue Drain & Vent Plans as part of coordinated IFC plumbing package; distribute to GC, plumbing installer (PKG-014), County representative, permit authority

Description: Safety Code permit support (Step 4.1–4.2)
Notes: Provide IFC drawings and calculations for plumbing Safety Code permit application (PKG-009); respond to permit authority questions; issue drawing revisions if required

Description: Construction support — RFIs and field clarifications (Step 4.3)
Notes: Respond to RFIs from plumbing installer (PKG-014); issue field clarifications or drawing revisions; County representative presence at inspections (SOW-0084)

Description: Project management — drain & vent plans design phase
Notes: PM coordination for drain & vent plans design phase; sourced from Level_of_Effort.csv R-01 allocation for DEL-006-03

Description: Cost estimating support — drain & vent plans
Notes: Estimating support; sourced from Level_of_Effort.csv R-08 allocation for DEL-006-03

Description: BIM / CAD production — drain & vent plan drawings
Notes: BIM technician production of drain/vent plan drawings, isometrics, details, schedules; sourced from Level_of_Effort.csv R-13 allocation for DEL-006-03

Description: Plumbing engineering — drain & vent system design
Notes: Lead plumbing engineer design effort for all drain/vent system engineering; sourced from Level_of_Effort.csv R-18 allocation for DEL-006-03
